status_line: Friday 2:41 AM. SARAH Run 84 (09:06 UTC) came back clean — Downloads blocked for the 7th straight run, output stable. SCOUT and Morning Brief both fire in about 25 minutes. LA Galaxy window closes tomorrow (Apr 25) — still the live clock that matters most. GUARDIAN has been dark for 16+ cycles; nothing should go to client without a pass. Six pending deletes in the output folder still need Rick's sign-off.
